headline: Starbucks Governance Shifts And Nashville Office Put Turnaround In Focus
summary: Starbucks (NasdaqGS:SBUX) used its annual meeting to approve governance changes, including a shift to simple majority voting for key shareholder decisions. Management indicated that the company is ahead of schedule on its turnaround efforts, signaling confidence in current operational initiatives. Starbucks also confirmed plans to open a new southeastern U.S. corporate office in Nashville, expanding its corporate footprint beyond established hubs. For readers tracking NasdaqGS:SBUX, this...
